title: stillingia serrulata
intro: Stillingia serrulata, also known as Queen's Root, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. The roots and rhizomes of the plant contain medicinal properties, including a compound called stillingine, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stillingia serrulata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and act as an anti-parasitic agent. Stillingia serrulata is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, and can be used to treat a range of conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin issues.
